problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: The key to Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? is Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics — specifically Monte Carlo tree — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
